title: Exotic Flaky Brazilian Chicken Empanadas
description: A peppery and flaky post-workout Brazilian dish featuring enchilada sauce, perfect for a snack or dinner. This dairy-free friendly recipe is made with score-fat and flavorful spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the score-fat over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the enchilada sauce and bring to a simmer.
Roll out the empanada dough and cut into circles.
Spoon the chicken mixture onto one half of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with a little score-fat and bake for 20 minutes.
